Executive Communication Coaching

Communicate with clarity.
Lead with impact.

I help senior leaders and high-performing professionals communicate more effectively, so their teams align, decisions move forward, and results follow.

Book a Conversation Learn More
20+
Years in strategic communications, leadership, and team development
Board Certified
Executive & Leadership Coach (BCC, CPCC, ICF)
Global
Experience across Fortune 500, academia, and high-growth organizations
What I Do

This isn't traditional coaching.

I work with leaders who are capable, driven, and experienced — but are navigating a new level of complexity.

Stepping into a larger role

New scope, bigger team, higher stakes — the communication demands change at every level.

Leading across functions or stakeholders

Influence without authority. Build consensus across silos. Get buy-in from people who don't report to you.

Managing increased visibility

When more eyes are on you, your message, presence, and delivery need to match your expertise.

Translating strategy into direction

Turn complex ideas into clear, actionable communication that moves people and organizations forward.

Who I Work With

You'll get the most from this work if you are

A senior leader or emerging executive navigating new complexity

A high-performing professional ready for greater visibility and influence

A leader in retail or fast-moving, customer-driven environments

Someone who wants to communicate with more clarity, confidence, and influence

How We Work Together

A focused approach that creates real change

Simple, structured, and designed around the outcomes that matter to you.

01

Clarify

We sharpen your thinking, priorities, and message so you know exactly what needs to be said — and why.

02

Communicate

We refine how you show up in conversations, presentations, and decisions so your message lands with clarity and confidence.

03

Align

We ensure your team and stakeholders understand, engage, and move forward together.

Ways to Work Together

Services designed for where you are

Executive Coaching

A 1:1 partnership designed to support you as you navigate leadership challenges, communication demands, and high-stakes decisions.

Book a Discovery Call

Team Workshops & Retreats

Interactive sessions that help teams build clarity, alignment, and a shared vision so they can execute effectively.

Send an Inquiry

Strategic Advisory

Ongoing support for leaders and organizations who want a trusted partner in communication, leadership, and team effectiveness.

Get in Touch
What Leaders Say

The impact of clear communication

Her coaching helped me communicate with confidence at a level I hadn't experienced before. It changed how I lead.
Senior Director — Fortune 500 Retail
Klara has a rare ability to see the gap between what you're saying and what you mean — and close it. My team noticed the difference immediately.
VP, Operations — Global Consumer Brand
Working with Klara gave me the clarity and structure to navigate a critical leadership transition. I felt prepared and grounded from day one.
C-Suite Executive — Technology
The team workshops transformed how we communicate across departments. We went from talking past each other to actually moving forward together.
Director of Strategy — Healthcare

Testimonials are illustrative placeholders — real client quotes coming soon.

Meet Klara

Thoughtful communication is at the heart of effective leadership.

With over two decades of experience in strategic communications, leadership, and team development — particularly within retail and fast-paced environments — I understand the realities leaders face every day.

Before founding Klarity International, I spent nearly seven years as Global Director of Marketing & Communications at Taco Bell International (Yum! Brands), taking a powerhouse domestic brand global across a dozen countries. Most recently, I served as Director of Professional Development & Executive Coach at UCI's Paul Merage School of Business, coaching EMBA students from engineers to C-level leaders.

My work is grounded, practical, and focused on real-world application. I partner with leaders to help them think more clearly, communicate more effectively, and lead in a way that brings others with them.

Board Certified Coach (BCC) CPCC ICF Member Thunderbird MBA Chapman · UCI · CSUF
Trusted by Leaders At
Yum! Brands Taco Bell Experian Hyundai Sony Electronics Prudential Wells Fargo Fluor Corp. UCI Merage Chapman University
Let's Connect

Ready to elevate how you communicate and lead?

If you're navigating a bigger role, leading through complexity, or ready to sharpen how you show up — I'd love to connect.
